milestone_issues.historical_significance: First postage stamps issued by independent India, depicting the Indian National Flag.
Issued to commemorate the inauguration of the Republic of India, featuring illustrations of a tech/industrial future and a traditional design.
Issued to celebrate the historic first successful ascent of Mount Everest by Tenzing Norgay and Edmund Hillary.
The world's first official airmail flight, covering 5 miles from Allahabad to Naini across the Yamuna River.
Asia's first postage stamps, issued strictly as a regional exhibition of postal efficiency in the Sind province before national stamps existed.
